title: Old Credits
description: This reverts the credits to how they were in release 1.8.8, before Microsoft bought Minecraft.
body:
![Old Credits Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fdf498fbe6255cc54d90c7826a226ce07f251f6b.png)
Old Credits is a Resource Pack that reverts of all the Minecraft Credits after Microsoft acquired Mojang in 2014, going back to what it was on Release 1.8.8
![Old Credits FAQ:](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/389a97a5214f49e502e02b5f669cb95129840e99.png) Here are some Frequently Asked Questions that I ask myself:
Frequently Asked Questions **Why did you make this?** > I don't like big tech, but I do like Minecraft. Unfortunetely, Minecraft is owned by a big tech company. **Are you going make this avalible on earlier versions?** > Yeah, I think so; I just need time to do it. But it's honestly not that hard to do. You could probably do it if you wanted to. I did make it availiable for Release 1.15-1.16.1 though! **What's up with the goofy logo?** > Why are you calling it goofy? It took me an entire 30 seconds to make!

### 📄 Other projects - [](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/no-microsoft-splashes) [No Microsoft Splashes](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/no-microsoft-splashes) - Removes all of the Minecraft Splashes and Credits after the acquisition of Mojang and returns the ones that had left. (Reverts to 1.8.8) - [](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/no-credits) [No Credits](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/no-credits) - Removes (most of) the long credits that some people don't want to see. - More coming soon
